build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 30, 3)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(4).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=3).rect(48, 28).extrude(1)

STEP 4: Create bolt holes — .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(-25, -15).circle(0.75).cutThruAll()
     .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(25, -15).circle(0.75).cutThruAll()
     .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(-25, 15).circle(0.75).cutThruAll()
     .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(25, 15).circle(0.75).cutThruAll()
